_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in utilizing or developing learning activities (e.g., scenarios, instructional games, interactive exercises).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.572), DG-S-006 (DG, cosine: 0.505).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.358). Shared vocabulary: [developing, skill]. DCWF-only terms [activities, exercises, games, instructional, interactive, learning] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.868, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.9%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in utilizing or developing learning activities (e.g., scenarios, instructi" and "Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including ta". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.598 > STS 0.358 (gap +0.240). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [developing, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [developing, skill]. DCWF-only: [activities, exercises, games, instructional, interactive, learning]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, building, career, data, design].
